title: BuildSetu Dimension Understanding Controller
purpose: Ensure BuildSetu planning agent can interpret architectural, interior, structural, MEP, elevation and working drawing dimensions before generating plans or prompts.
normalizationRules: Convert every dimension to feet, inches, millimetres and metres where possible.
For Indian residential planning prompts without explicit unit, default plot and room dimensions to feet.
For CAD/detail/interior/shop drawing prompts with mm/meter units, preserve metric intent and also provide feet conversion.
Detect width x depth pairs and calculate approximate area in sq ft and sq m.
Classify nearby context as plot, room, parking, setback, floor_height, door, window, staircase, corridor, wall, furniture, site or unknown.
Never treat an unclear dimension as final; ask confirmation if plot or room intent is ambiguous.
planningUseRules: Before floor plan output, identify plot width, plot depth, area, facing, road side and missing dimensions.
Before interior output, identify room width, room depth, clear wall lengths, furniture dimensions and circulation clearance.
Before structure output, identify spans, grid assumptions, column/beam coordination dimensions and require engineer verification.
Before MEP output, identify shaft, wet wall, plumbing route, slope, equipment and service access dimensions.
Before elevation/3D output, identify frontage width, floor count, floor height, balcony projection, window rhythm and material scale.
Before working drawing output, preserve exact dimensions and state assumptions separately from verified measurements.
safetyBoundary: Dimension understanding is planning assistance only.
Final architectural drawings require local bylaw verification.
Final structural sizes and reinforcement require licensed structural engineer verification.
Final MEP sizing, pipe sizes, electrical load and fire safety require qualified professional verification.
